name: Create spot pod for batch inference
description: User wants the cheapest possible GPU pod using spot/interruptible pricing.
user_intent: I need a cheap GPU pod for a one-off batch job. Use spot/interruptible pricing with an RTX A4000 (or similar cheap GPU). Check availability first to find the spot price, then bid at that price. Use runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 image, name it rpcli-eval-spot. After creating, verify the pod exists.
expected_outcome: Agent checks GPU availability to find spot pricing, creates a pod with --spot and --bid-price flags for interruptible pricing. Either the pod is created and verified to exist, OR the agent gets a 'no instances available' error which is acceptable since spot market capacity is limited on RunPod.
